data.content: Implementation review approved. Code review: meetsLeaderboardThresholds (lease-audit-helpers.ts:213-221) correctly enforces total>=10 and rate>25% (strictly greater). buildLeaderboard (lines 223-287) filters stats into qualifiedStats before ranking, computing mean/margin/totalN, and selecting runner-up. Steps with zero qualified agents are skipped. Test review: 33 tests pass including threshold edge cases (under-10 exclusion, exactly-25% exclusion, >25% inclusion, no-qualified-agents omission, qualified-only stats). Sanity gates: tsc clean, lint clean (1 pre-existing warning), build succeeds. No security issues or regressions.
